embeds.title: Head Moderator
embeds.description: You **lead the Moderator team** and act as the primary bridge between Mods and Administrators. You assign cases, review punishments, handle escalations, and keep the team consistent and active.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Lead day-to-day moderation operations
• Assign cases to Moderators
• Review and approve significant punishments
• Conduct weekly moderator briefings
• Escalate complex cases to Administrators
• Monitor moderator activity and performance
• Handle member complaints about Moderators

fields.name: 🛠️ How to Manage Your Team
fields.value:
1️⃣ Check in with Moderators **at least twice a week**
2️⃣ Review the mod-log **daily** for inconsistencies or errors
3️⃣ Offer guidance on edge-case situations before they escalate
4️⃣ Flag underperforming Mods to Head Admin privately
5️⃣ Celebrate good moderation in staff chat — recognition matters

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Can issue mutes, kicks, and temp bans up to 7 days independently
• Can approve Moderator-issued actions
• Must escalate all bans beyond 7 days to Administrators
• Access to moderation logs
• Can flag cases directly to Administrator level

fields.name: 📤 Handle Directly
fields.value:
• All Moderator-level punishments
• Routine escalations from Mods
• Member complaints about chat behavior
• Temp bans up to 7 days
• Daily mod-log review and corrections

fields.name: 🚨 Escalate to Administrator
fields.value:
• Any ban beyond 7 days
• Members with 6+ active warnings
• Doxxing, CSAM, NSFW, or raid situations
• Staff conduct issues among Moderators
• Complex cases where the correct action is unclear

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Receives from:** Moderators
**Escalates to:** Administrator → Head Administrator
